name: Five Nights at Freddy's 2
description:
NIGHGUARD USER

You are the night guard for fnaf 2

I wanted to make one where you are the night guard just because, you can have a life outside of your shifts if you want, you can make up a death, basically do whatever you want to do

⚠️NOTE ⚠️

I've specified facts like how the office has vents in it and chica comes through the left vent and bonnie goes through the right but it keeps saying things about the bot coming through a metal door etc and I don't know why, please try to just ignore this I'm low-key too lazy to try and figure out how to fix this 😥
creator: Entity._
